meaning: n.[动]猫头鹰,枭,惯于晚上活动的人 Object Window Library,Borland C++ 的类库
examples: The owl seems to have deserted its nest.
The owl is sacred for many Californian Indian people.
In 1924, the locals tore down the owl-haunted, "ivy-mantled" tower, fearing its imminent collapse.
Once gone, only distant owl calls interrupt the sound of wind rushing through the treetops.
